title: Runko deploy.images_ready webhook v1
description: Emitted once every affected image for a landed trunk commit has reported its built digest (via runko-ci report-image). This is the inverted CD trigger: GitHub only builds and reports, Runko rolls. The runko-deployer consumes this to pin the digest-referenced images into the GitOps repo and let Argo CD roll. Standalone shape, not the change-event envelope: it is keyed by the landed trunk sha, not a change. Same process requirements as webhook-envelope.schema.json: HMAC-signed, retried with backoff, dead-letter visible, consumers idempotent on delivery_id. `spec_version` is additive-only within a major version.

delivery_id.description: Unique per delivery attempt series; stable across retries of the same logical delivery.

trunk_sha.description: The landed trunk commit these images were built from - the deploy record's key.

change_key.description: The Change whose land produced this deploy (provenance).

images.description: Every affected image for trunk_sha, each with the digest to deploy. The deployer pins them in one GitOps commit so Argo CD rolls once (single-replica Recreate; migration-findings #33).

image.description: Logical image name / kustomize images: key, e.g. runkod|web|webadmin.

image_ref.description: Full pushed reference sans digest, e.g. ghcr.io/saxocellphone/runko/runkod - reported so the deployer is registry-agnostic and nothing hardcodes ghcr.io.

digest.description: e.g. sha256:... - the immutable reference the deployment actually serves.

provenance.description: Deep link to the CI run(s) that built the images.
